series.series_zh: 兰花系列 · 特别的花
series.title: Phalaenopsis — Nine Colorways
series.tagline: We chose the orchid for a single reason: no other flower holds this silhouette. Nine colours, nine moods — each one a different way of remembering.
series.tagline_zh: 选择兰花，只因没有任何花拥有这样的花型。九款色系，每一款以一种感受命名。
series.story:
For a thousand years the orchid has appeared in East Asian art, and the reason is not mysterious: it is one of the few flowers whose shape is unmistakably itself — two wings half-spread, poised in a moment that is neither landing nor departing, suspended in something that has no other name.

This series begins from that single, undeniable fact. No added leaves. No ornamental tendrils. Only the flower — wound thread by thread, in silence, until it becomes the thing it has always been.

Nine colour stories, each named for a sensory memory held somewhere between taste and feeling:
Honey Peach Oolong (蜜桃乌龙) · Into the Emerald Forest (绿野仙踪) · Sea Salt Mango Ice (海盐芒果冰) · Frozen Wonderland (冰雪奇缘) · Gilded Dreams (澛金旧梦) · Starry Moon Night (星月夜) · Taro Waves (芋泥啵啵) · Lavender Mist (薰衣草) · Deep Ocean (深海蓝)

Available as earrings (耳钉), clip-ons (耳夹), rings (戒指), and pendants (挂坠).
series.story_zh:
兰花在东亚艺术中出现逾千年，原因只有一个：没有任何花的花型如此特别——如翅膀般展开，宁静而卓越。

这个系列从这一事实出发。没有多余的叶片，没有装饰性卷须，只有这朵花——一圈一圈地缠绕，直到它成为它本来就是的样子。

九款色系，每一款以一种感官记忆命名：
蜜桃乌龙 · 绿野仙踪 · 海盐芒果冰 · 冰雪奇缘 · 澛金旧梦 · 星月夜 · 芋泥啵啵 · 薰衣草 · 深海蓝

提供耳钉、耳夹、戒指与挂坠。
series.price: 耳钉 $79/pr · 耳挂 $60 · 戒指/挂坠 from $80
series.price_zh: 耳钉 $79一对 · 耳挂 $60一只 · 戒指/挂坠 $80起

series.series_zh: 四时之景 · 春 · 月下逢
series.title: Lily in Moonlight
series.tagline: Petals of white silk, edges fading into night-sky blue. Amber warm against jade cool. Spring moonlight, made wearable.
series.tagline_zh: 白色蚕丝渐染蓝边，琥珀珠与玉珠，春夜月光的流光感。
series.story:
Du Fu wrote it in a single breath:

「若非群玉山头见，会向瑶台月下逢。」
"Had I not glimpsed you at the summit of Jade Mountain — then surely, we were meant to meet beneath the moon at Yaotai."

The lily is rendered in white silk, its petals fading from the pure white of the flower's heart to the cool, unnameable blue of a night sky at the tips. Gold copper wire curves outward, unhurried, the way a stem moves in a breeze — catching light the way a living thing catches moonlight.

Yellow amber, warm as a late afternoon, is scattered against white jade, cool as the hour before dawn. Earth held against sky. A conversation between what is near and what is far.

Full set: hairpin (发簪), brooches (胸针), ring, earrings (耳夹 + 耳挂).
series.story_zh:
灵感来自杜甫诗句：「若非群玉山头见，会向瑶台月下逢。」

白色蚕丝花瓣边缘渐染蓝色，从花心纯白过渡至花尖夜空蓝。金色铜丝自由延伸如藤蔓，黄色琥珀珠与白色玉珠点缀其间——暖与冷、土地与天空的对比。

整套：发簪、胸针、戒指、耳饰（耳夹+耳挂）。

series.series_zh: 四时之景 · 夏 · 一一风荷举
series.title: Lotus Rising
series.tagline: A single breath, suspended. Silk petals risen halfway, still — as if summer itself asked them to hold.
series.tagline_zh: 淡绿与藕白花瓣，凝固于上升一息之间。淡水珍珠与翡翠珠，夏日的静谧。
series.story:
Zhou Bangyan found the image in one unhurried line:

「水面清圆，一一风荷举。」
"The water's surface — round and clear — lotus after lotus lifting gently in the wind."

This is the moment the collection holds. Not the lotus in full bloom. Not the stem beneath the water. The instant between — when a petal has lifted on a summer breeze and hangs there, weightless, before it settles back into itself.

Pale green and blush-white silk petals tip upward as if mid-breath, as if the wind is still passing through them. Freshwater pearls (淡水珍珠) and jade beads (翡翠珠) rest among them — cool and still, like the water below.

Full set: hairpin (发簪), brooches (胸针), ring (戒指), earrings (耳夹 + 耳挂).
series.story_zh:
灵感来自周邦彦《苏幕遮》：「水面清圆，一一风荷举。」

这个系列定格一个瞬间：莲花花瓣在夏风中轻轻扬起，悬在半空，凝固于起落之间。

淡绿与藕白丝绸花瓣花尖上翘，如同凝固于风中一息。淡水珍珠与翡翠珠点缀其间，清凉静谧如花下湖水。

整套：发簪、胸针、戒指、耳饰（耳夹+耳挂）。

series.series_zh: 四时之景 · 秋 · 月桂流金
series.title: Osmanthus in Gold
series.tagline: Tiny gold blossoms, enlarged into something you can finally see. October's palette — warm gold light, cool green shadow — held in silk.
series.tagline_zh: 金黄桂花簇，墨绿金边叶，可佩戴的秋天。
series.story:
「月桂流金」— The Moon-Laurel in Flowing Gold.

In nature, the osmanthus blossom is barely there — four petals, each smaller than a fingernail, easily missed on the branch. The scent arrives before the flower does. You smell October before you see it.

This series asks a single question: what if you could see what you have always only been able to smell?

The blossoms are intentionally enlarged so that the four-petal structure — precise, symmetrical, quietly perfect — becomes something you can hold in your eye and truly appreciate. Gold and amber blooms against deep olive-green metallic leaves: the exact palette of a moon-viewing evening in October, warm gold light pooling in cool green shadow.

Three forms:
· Lattice brooches (花窗胸针) — osmanthus blooming from a woven bamboo-lattice base
· Hairpin (发簪) — gold U-pin with osmanthus, pearls, amber beads, white jade disc
· Hair crown (发冠) — curved gold frame, jade beads, leaf pendants

Featured on CCTV Spring Festival Gala 2026.
series.story_zh:
「月桂流金」——月光下流金般的桂花。

自然界的桂花极小，容易被忽视。在这个系列中，花朵被有意放大，让四瓣结构成为可以真正被欣赏的焦点。

金黄色桂花簇与墨绿色金边叶片——十月赏月夜晚的精准色彩。

三种形式：
· 花窗胸针——桂花从竹编镂空底座中绽放
· 发簪——金色U型，配桂花、珍珠、琥珀珠与白玉月片
· 发冠——金色弧形框架，翡翠珠与叶片挂坠

★ 2026年央视春晚亮相

series.series_zh: 四时之景 · 冬 · 却下水晶帘
series.title: Crystal Curtain
series.tagline: She lets the crystal curtain fall, and gazes at the autumn moon. Li Bai's line — made wearable, made yours.
series.tagline_zh: 李白诗意，以丝绸与水晶重现。静冬夜色，月光透过水晶帘。
series.story:
Li Bai wrote it at a window, alone in winter:

「却下水晶帘，玲珑望秋月。」
"She lets the crystal curtain fall — and through its jade-clear folds, gazes at the autumn moon."

At the centre of the piece: a large moon disc, semi-opaque white — the kind of white that holds light long after the source has gone. Around it, small five-petal flowers in lavender and blue-white bloom along gold copper wire, filling in the cold, clear night-sky palette that no other season can produce.

The wire curls outward, slow and deliberate, like fern fronds uncurling in their own time. From the lower arc, crystal chain tassels fall — transparent, almost weightless, catching light with every movement the way moonbeams move through glass.

Presented as a hairpin set (发簪) with a companion brooch.
series.story_zh:
「却下水晶帘，玲珑望秋月。」——李白

中央是一枚大型半透明圆形月片，淡淡发光。周围，薰衣草紫与蓝白渐变的五瓣小花沿金色铜丝绽放——夜空独有的清冷色调。

金色铜丝自由延伸如蕨类舒展，下方垂落水晶透明链条流苏——随风摇曳，折射月光透过水晶帘的意象。

以发簪套装形式呈现，搭配一枚胸针。

series.series_zh: 亲情系列 · 告诉我们你们的故事
series.title: Kinship Sets — Mother, Daughter, Sisters
series.title_zh: 亲情系列 · 母女·姐妹·三代套装
series.tagline: Two pieces, or three — made for the people who share a history. Not matching, but related. Like family.
series.tagline_zh: 两件或三件——为那些共享同一段历史的人而做。不是一模一样，而是彼此呼应。就像家人。
series.story:
The Kinship Series does not begin with a catalogue. It begins with a conversation.

Tell us about the people. The mother who always wore something gold, and the daughter who has her eyes. The two sisters who grew up in the same room and now live in different cities, and who still finish each other's sentences when they call. The grandmother, the mother, the granddaughter — three generations, three different ideas of beauty, and one story running quietly through all of them.

We design paired sets for mothers and daughters, for sisters, for best friends who are close enough to count as family. Each set begins from a shared flower — the same silhouette, rendered in two colour stories that speak to each person separately, then speak to each other when placed side by side.

We also design family collections of three: a larger piece and two smaller ones, or three equal pieces in related colours — decided together, after we hear the story.

Formats available:
· Mother & Daughter set (2 pieces)
· Sisters set (2 or 3 pieces)
· Three Generations set (3 pieces)

Every set comes with a shared handwritten story card — the record of what you told us, and what we made from it.
series.story_zh:
亲情系列从一次对话开始，不是从商品目录开始。

告诉我们关于这些人的故事。总爱戴金色饰物的母亲，和长了她眼睛的女儿。在同一个房间长大、如今分居两座城市、打电话时还是会接对方的话的两姐妹。祖母、母亲、外孙女——三代人，三种不同的美感，一段静静穿越其中的故事。

我们为母女、姐妹、亲密如家人的朋友设计成对套装。每套从同一朵花出发——相同的花形，两款彼此呼应的配色，各自说的是不同的人，并排时说的是同一段关系。

我们也设计三代套装：一件较大的、两件较小的，或三件等大但配色相关的作品——听完故事后，一起决定。

可选形式：
· 母女套装（2件）
· 姐妹套装（2件或3件）
· 三代套装（3件）

每套附一张共同的手写故事卡——记录你告诉我们的事，以及我们从中做出的东西。

series.series: 聆花系列 · The Listening Bloom
series.series_zh: 聆花系列 · 耳后的花园
series.title: The Listening Bloom — Worn Behind the Ear
series.title_zh: 聆花系列 · 为助听器而生的花
series.tagline: Where sound enters, a flower blooms. Ultralight silk curved to follow a hearing aid — worn behind the ear, invisible to the world, present only for you.
series.tagline_zh: 声音进入的地方，花开了。极轻蚕丝，随助听器弧度弯曲，佩戴于耳后，世界看不见，只有你知道。
series.story:
There is a place most people will never see.

Behind the ear, where a hearing aid rests against the skin — curved, quiet, doing its work without asking to be noticed. For years, people have worn them as something to apologise for. Something to tuck away, to wish were smaller, less visible, less there.

This series begins from a different idea entirely.

If something lives behind your ear — in the exact place where sound enters, where the world reaches you — why not let a flower live there too?

The Listening Bloom is made from the same silk thread as our other collections, wound around hand-formed copper wire. But curved. Each piece is shaped to follow the gentle arc of a hearing aid, resting lightly against the bone behind the ear. The weight of a single piece is almost nothing — lighter than an earring, lighter than a pin. It stays by staying softly.

We make these in silk orchids, in small osmanthus clusters, in the five-petal flowers from the Crystal Curtain and the Lily in Moonlight series. In any colour from our nine orchid families. In whatever flower you would choose.

Because this is not a piece you hide. It is a piece that says: sound reaches me here — and here is where I have chosen to bloom.

Also beautiful for anyone who prefers behind-the-ear adornment without a hearing aid.
series.story_zh:
有一个地方，大多数人永远看不见。

耳后，助听器贴着皮肤的地方——弯曲，安静，不声不响地做着它的工作。多年来，人们把它当作需要道歉的东西，藏起来，希望它更小、更不显眼、更不存在。

这个系列从一个完全不同的想法出发。

如果有什么东西住在你耳后——在声音进入、世界抵达你的那个精确位置——为什么不让一朵花也住在那里？

聆花系列用与其他系列相同的蚕丝缠绕在手工成型的铜丝上，但有弧度。每一件作品都随着助听器的轻柔弧线弯曲，轻轻贴在耳后的骨骼上。单件几乎没有重量——比耳环轻，比别针轻。它以柔软的方式留在那里。

我们用丝绸兰花、小桂花簇、《却下水晶帘》和《月下逢》系列中的五瓣花来制作。九款兰花色系中的任何颜色。

这不是一件你藏起来的作品。它在说：声音在这里抵达我——而这里，是我选择绽放的地方。

同样适合任何喜欢耳后装饰、无论是否佩戴助听器的人。

series.series_zh: 定制系列 · 主推兰花
series.title: Bespoke — Begin with the Flower
series.title_zh: 定制系列 · 先选花形，再选颜色
series.tagline: Every commission begins with a single question: which flower? Everything else — colour, jewel, story — follows from there. From $140.
series.tagline_zh: 选择花形，再选颜色，再选珠宝，最后告诉我们你的故事。$140起。
series.story:
Every bespoke commission begins with the flower.

Not the colour, not the jewels, not the occasion — the flower first. Because the flower determines everything: its silhouette, its natural palette, the way light will pass through it or rest on it like something that belongs.

The orchid is our signature — nine colour families, each carrying a different register of feeling. The lotus receives blue and blush. The osmanthus lives in gold and amber. The lily holds its own in moonlit white.

Once the flower is chosen, we guide you through colour — not which colour in the abstract, but what colour for this person, on this occasion, in this particular quality of light. Then the jewels: which gemstone catches light the way you have been imagining it. Then the story — the occasion, the person, the thing this piece is meant to carry into the future.

No two bespoke pieces are the same. Each one is completed with a personalised story card: a quiet record of the choices made, and the meaning that lived behind them.
series.story_zh:
每一件定制委托从花开始。

兰花是我们的招牌——九款色系，每款产生不同的情感共鸣。荷花可定制蓝色与粉色。桂花以金色和琥珀色为主。百合以月光白为基调。

选好花形后，我们引导你选择颜色——不只是哪种颜色，而是什么感受。然后是珠宝：哪种宝石在光线下的折射符合你的期待。最后是故事——这件珠宝要承载的场合、那个人、那段记忆。

没有两件定制作品完全相同。每件作品附一张个人故事卡，记录选择的过程与背后的意义。
